title: perplexity
content:
- [Introducing Perplexity Pages](https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/perplexity-pages)
- ```
- ## Perplexity API markdown project
- Setup
  - https://chatgpt.com/share/e/bbc503b7-ea60-4a31-8448-9e5ae7964833
  - {{embed ((66e15237-cdad-40d4-8878-3c31013b9220))}}
- Prompt
- ```
  - I want to open a markdown file, and remove all occurrences of double square brackets of the form [[ and ]] to clean up logseq knowledge graph linkages.
  - Body
  - messages
  - Show child attributes
  - max_tokens
  - temperature
  - top_p
  - return_citations
  - return_images
  - return_related_questions
  - top_k
  - stream
  - presence_penalty
  - frequency_penalty
  - model
  - object
  - created
  - choices
  - Hide child attributes
  - choices.index
  - Available options: stop, length
  - Show child attributes
  - choices.delta
  - Show child attributes
  - usage
  - Hide child attributes
  - usage.prompt_tokens
  - usage.completion_tokens
  - usage.total_tokens
  - We should send these to the perplexity API alongside the prompt which will be loaded from another file. Also sent will be an array of topics loaded from a csv. There may be dozens of such topics and they may contain spaces.
  - On receipt of the response from perplexity the code should move the original core block (not the surrounding context blocks) into code fenced markdown between three ' and write the full response markdown from perplexity into the block child of that block.
